answer: The zip code 78731 has the highest number of active franchise tax permit holders with 34,989 businesses, while it also has 486 code violations. Similarly, zip code 78701 has 4,474 active businesses and 487 code violations. These figures highlight areas with significant overlap between business activity and code violations.
